mnemonics: Multiple Modules Invert Commonly Before Decoding
keyPoints: Introduction to Combinational Logic: basic building blocks of digital circuits
Combinational Circuits: AND, OR, and NOT gates, combination of these gates to create more complex circuits
Design Procedure: identify inputs, outputs, and logic functions, create truth tables, K-maps, or sum-of-products expressions
Binary Adder-Subtractor: basic operation, carry and borrow generation, ripple adder, Wallace tree adder
Decoders: 1-of-N, 1-of-M, priority encoders, selection of one output from multiple inputs
Encoders: binary to decimal, Gray code, binary to ternary
Multiplexers: selection of one output from multiple inputs, data switching, gray code multiplexers
